---
name: 🚨 Security Incident Report
about: Report a cybersecurity incident for the Indonesia Cybersecurity Incident Index
title: "[INCIDENT] "
labels: ["incident", "security"]
assignees: ["SHA888"]

---

## 🚨 Incident Information

**Date and Time of Incident:**
<!-- YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM WIB (Western Indonesia Time) -->

**Incident Severity:**
- [ ] Critical ( widespread impact, business continuity affected)
- [ ] High ( significant impact, multiple systems affected)
- [ ] Medium ( limited impact, single system affected)
- [ ] Low ( minimal impact, contained quickly)

**Incident Category:**
- [ ] Malware/Ransomware
- [ ] Phishing/Social Engineering
- [ ] DDoS Attack
- [ ] Data Breach
- [ ] Web Application Attack
- [ ] Network Intrusion
- [ ] Insider Threat
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📋 Incident Details

**Summary:**
<!-- Brief description of what happened -->

**Affected Systems/Assets:**
<!-- List all affected systems, applications, or data -->

**Impact Assessment:**
<!-- Describe the business and technical impact -->

**Current Status:**
- [ ] Ongoing
- [ ] Contained
- [ ] Resolved
- [ ] Under Investigation

**Detection Method:**
<!-- How was the incident detected? -->

## 🔍 Investigation Details

**Timeline:**
<!-- Provide a timeline of key events -->

**Root Cause Analysis:**
<!-- What caused the incident? -->

**Indicators of Compromise (IoCs):**
<!-- List any IPs, domains, file hashes, etc. -->

**Affected Data:**
<!-- What type of data was compromised? -->

## 🛡️ Response Actions

**Immediate Actions Taken:**
<!-- What immediate steps were taken to contain the incident? -->

**Long-term Remediation:**
<!-- What long-term fixes are planned? -->

**Lessons Learned:**
<!-- What can be improved based on this incident? -->

## 📊 Additional Information

**Reporting Party:**
<!-- Name and organization of the entity reporting this incident -->

**Contact Information:**
<!-- Email/phone for follow-up questions -->

**References:**
<!-- Any external references, news articles, security advisories -->

**Attachments:**
<!-- Any relevant logs, screenshots, or documents -->

---

## 📝 Submission Guidelines

Please ensure:
- [ ] All required fields are completed
- [ ] Sensitive information is properly redacted
- [ ] Contact information is accurate
- [ ] Incident severity is appropriately assessed
- [ ] Timeline is as complete as possible

**Privacy Note:** This incident report will be processed and may be anonymized before inclusion in the public Indonesia Cybersecurity Incident Index database.
